column8: port td5_plat_heap_reset uses 1MB initial (orig 24MB) + null-check gate instead of DAT_004aee4c sentinel; both behaviour-neutral on Win32 growable heap per documented L5 audit
port td5_plat_heap_alloc uses HEAP_ZERO_MEMORY flag (orig flags=0) and drops _gGameHeapAllocTotal/Peak tracking globals; debug-only bookkeeping, zero-fill safer
orig is software RGBA->packed-pixel quantizer for D3D3 surface formats (RGB565/ARGB1555); port replaces with box-filter mipmap builder for D3D11 B8G8R8A8_UNORM swap chain per ARCH-DIVERGENCE note

orig trusts single fixed layout (count+offset/size pairs); port adds defensive 3-variant layout autodetection + (offset,size)/(size,offset) field-order detect; forward path byte-equivalent on stock content per Wave 5 audit
orig is 13-byte direct LUT (table+idx*8); port adds reverse-direction mirror+MODELS.DAT presence gate+STRIP fallback chain; forward+MODELS.DAT-loaded path byte-equivalent per documented L5 audit
